channel.title: FMallSectionsDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from FMallSectionsDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Unfair Treatment of Barrett
item.description: A respected justice on an excellent court should not face public criticism.

item.title: A Chance for Trump to Secure Peace in Ukraine
Visiting Jefferson's Monticello as the Declaration Turns 250
item.description: It is a lively museum, research hub, and the closest we have to Jefferson's replica.

item.title: Your Phone Data Belongs to You
item.description: A Supreme Court ruling limits government surveillance but could have gone further.
